name: io.github.markusvankempen/code-engine-mcp-server
title: IBM Code Engine MCP Server
description: Deploy to IBM Code Engine from Cursor, Copilot, Claude & Cline. Build, push, deploy via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: IBMCLOUD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: IBM Cloud API key used to authenticate and call Code Engine APIs

environmentVariables.name: IBMCLOUD_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Default IBM Cloud region (for example: us-south)

environmentVariables.name: CONTAINER_RUNTIME
environmentVariables.description: Optional container runtime override: docker or podman
